title: Reflection Regeneration & Validation
purpose: Regenerate all markdown reflections from canonical JSON, validate reflection integrity, and enforce the invariant that generated artifacts never become authoritative.
architectural_constraints: All reflections generated deterministically from canonical JSON
Hash validation confirms reflection matches source
No manual edits to generated reflections
CI gate blocks PRs with stale reflections
acceptance_criteria: generate-governance.ts produces deterministic output (same input → same hash)
validate-reflections.ts exits 0 on all current reflections
npm run governance:generate runs without error
npm run governance:diff exits 0 (no stale generated files)
npm run audit:run passes with 0 critical findings

traceability.description: Reflection regeneration complete: audit passes 100/100 with 0 findings, pm:validate passes, governance:diff passes, 7 missing reflections documented for T26.7 scope.

failure_modes.scenario: Generation script produces non-deterministic output due to timestamp embedding
failure_modes.mitigation: Pin timestamps in test mode, use deterministic sorting
